options.name: -keep_separate_arc
options.description: always create a separate timing arcs with respective mode been appended.

options.name: -library_file
options.description: Input Library files that needs to be merged

options.name: -modes
options.description: Mode names required for merging the libraries. The number of mode names should be equal to the number of input libraries

options.name: -outfile
options.description: The final Merged Library Output file name.

options.name: -pin_cap_tolerance
options.description: pin capacitance tolerance for making tolerance comparsion for library merging.

options.name: -tolerance
options.description: tolerance value for making tolerance comparsion for library merging.
